'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=8p6MyJXBy3A9qY.3o93ZMV7_OkSH1ZmjM_yP00LDeZA-1774710856-1.0.1.1-F0apQoUW2BBIeuZ15L0Q6qK07PNKldR9xAzfwnmAyFk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
